---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## To reproduce

The exact command or code:

```bash
# e.g. autofollowdown recommend Qwen/Qwen3-0.6B --goal size
```

If it's a CLI error, please re-run with `AFD_DEBUG=1` and paste the full traceback.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- autofollowdown version: (`autofollowdown --version`)
- Python version:
- OS / hardware (CPU / GPU model):
- Installed optional backends (nni / llmcompressor / modelopt / torchao / bnb / hqq):
